scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npx prisma generate && npx tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['./dist/public','../dist/public'].forEach(d=>{try{fs.cpSync('../frontend/dist',d,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied to:',d)}catch(e){console.log('Skip:',d)}})"
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma db push --skip-generate && node dist/server.js
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
